compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray shaded oval labeled 'NEURONS' containing ADF, AWB, URX, and RIC neurons in Panel E.

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue triangle labeled 'ADF' inside NEURONS compartment; associated gene tph-1 in Panel E.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle labeled 'AWB' inside NEURONS compartment; associated gene ser-6 in Panel E.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' inside NEURONS compartment; associated gene mod-1, with small dots/granules drawn nearby in Panel E. Also indicated by open arrowhead in Panel C micrographs.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red pentagon labeled 'RIC' inside NEURONS compartment; associated gene tbh-1 in Panel E.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded rectangle labeled 'INTESTINE' in Panel E, containing nhr-76, ATGL, and beta-oxidation/fat loss.

genes.snippet: Italic label above ADF blue triangle in Panel E; also x-axis category in Panel B bar graph and part of genotype labels in Panel A micrographs.
Italic label above AWB green triangle in Panel E.
Italic label above URX yellow hexagon in Panel E; also part of transgene Pflp-8::mod-1SAS in Panels C and D.
Italic label above RIC red pentagon in Panel E.
Italic gene label inside INTESTINE compartment in Panel E; shown with arrow to ATGL.
Italic gene label inside INTESTINE compartment in Panel E; receives arrow from nhr-76 and sends arrow to beta-oxidation/fat loss.

ATGL is labeled in the figure; in C. elegans context this likely corresponds to atgl-1 but the figure uses the mammalian/generic symbol 'ATGL'. Included as alternate reference with reduced confidence.

tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ADF to URX labeled '5-HT' in Panel E; tph-1 is the gene in ADF, mod-1 is the gene in URX.
Solid pointed arrow from AWB (ser-6) toward ADF (tph-1) in Panel E. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid pointed arrow from RIC (tbh-1) to AWB (ser-6) labeled 'Oct' (octopamine) in Panel E.
Dashed arrow from URX (mod-1) toward RIC (tbh-1) in Panel E; dashed line may indicate indirect regulation.
Dashed arrow from URX to INTESTINE labeled 'endocrine signal' in Panel E; small dots/granules near URX suggest secreted signal.
Solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL within the INTESTINE compartment in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow from ATGL to 'beta-oxidation / Fat loss' within the INTESTINE compartment in Panel E; target is a process rather than a specific gene. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
